title: Memberships, accreditations, fees and commissions
description: Deductions for union fees, professional memberships, working with children check, agency fees and commissions.
keywords: union fees, professional memberships, working with children check, agency fees, commissions

child_links.title: Union fees subscriptions to associations and bargaining agents fees
child_links.description: Deductions for union fees, subscriptions, business or professional associations and payment of a bargaining agent's fee.

child_links.title: Professional memberships and accreditations
child_links.description: Deductions for the cost of a membership, accreditation or annual practising certificate you need to work in your field.

child_links.title: Working with children check
child_links.description: Deductions for the cost of a working with children check if you currently work with children.

child_links.title: Agency fees, commissions and wages you pay
child_links.description: Deductions for agency fees or commissions, and for wages you pay to someone who helps you earn your commission income.

child_links.title: Election expenses
child_links.description: Deductions for the costs of contesting parliamentary and local government elections, and union elections.

source_title: Memberships, accreditations, fees and commissions - ATO
